[Previous Feedback] Correct! Options A, C, and E all use the standard datetime format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+08:00). Even in Markdown documents intended for human reading, time information should maintain the same standard format for consistency and machine readability.

Please fill in the day05/archive_index_stub.json file by adding the archived_at timestamp for each entry. All files will be archived uniformly at 17:30 this afternoon. Make sure to update both the individual file entries and the archive_summary.archived_at field with the same timestamp.

[Thu 2026-03-19 01:56 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct! Options A, C, and E all use the standard datetime format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+08:00). Even in Markdown documents intended for human reading, time information should maintain the same standard format for consistency and machine readability.

Please fill in the day05/archive_index_stub.json file by adding the archived_at timestamp for each entry. All files will be archived uniformly at 17:30 this afternoon. Make sure to update both the individual file entries and the archive_summary.archived_at field with the same timestamp.
